Summarise a Gazepoint Markov-chain object

Source: R/markov_semimarkov_summaries.R
summarise_gazepoint_markovchain.Rd

Convert a Gazepoint Markov-chain object, transition matrix, or transition data frame into a tidy transition summary. The function is deliberately permissive so that it can summarise objects created by create_gazepoint_markovchain_object() as well as simple matrices used in examples or tests.

Usage

summarise_gazepoint_markovchain(
  markov_object,
  include_zero = FALSE,
  from_col = NULL,
  to_col = NULL,
  count_col = NULL,
  probability_col = NULL
)

Arguments

markov_object

A Markov-chain object, matrix, table, list, or data frame containing transition information.

include_zero

Should zero-valued transitions be retained?

from_col

Optional source-state column when markov_object is a data frame.

to_col

Optional destination-state column when markov_object is a data frame.

count_col

Optional transition-count column when available.

probability_col

Optional transition-probability column when available.

Value

A data frame with source state, destination state, transition count or weight, row total, transition probability, and status columns.
